2023-24 Evansville Purple Aces Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 17-18 (6-14, 10th in MVC MBB)

Coach: David Ragland

PS/G: 70.9 (258th of 362)

PA/G: 73.2 (226th of 362)

SRS: -3.69 (205th of 362)

SOS: 0.75 (131st of 362)

ORtg: 101.1 (286th of 362)

DRtg: 104.4 (197th of 362)
